issues.description: Condition should be 'LeaderHasType' (checking leader type), not 'HasCardOnBoard' (checks board for card name)
Condition structure incorrect. Should use 'type' and 'value' for LeaderHasType, not 'name'
Action should be 'ForceDiscard' (trash from deck), not 'TrashFromHand' (trash from hand). Card text specifies 'trash 5 cards from the top of your deck'

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] If your Leader has the {Straw Hat Crew} type, trash 5 cards from the top of your deck.
